zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow於1274年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾巴洛諾可時，他的父親SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON49歲，母親MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH18歲。他於大約1319年與Mary Gordon在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡焦福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡焦福享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow于1274年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾巴洛諾可时，他的父亲SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON49岁，母亲MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH18岁。他于大约1319年与Mary Gordon在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡焦福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1346年在苏格兰藍納可爾卡焦福享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hamilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from what is now a deserted village in the parish of Barkby, Leicestershire. This is named from Old English hamel ‘crooked’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hamilton near Glasgow was founded by the English Hamiltons and named after them, and later bearers took their surname from the Scottish place. In the north of Ireland, where many Hamiltons settled in the 17th century, this surname may sometimes have been adopted for Hamill . It has also been adopted as an Anglicized form of southern Irish Ó hUrmholtaigh.

History: This name is borne by one of the most distinguished families of the Scottish nobility; they hold many titles, including marquessate and dukedom of Hamilton, the marquessate of Douglas, the dukedom of Abercorn, and the earldom of Haddington. They are descended from Walter FitzGilbert de Hameldone, a Norman baron who gave his support to Robert the Bruce in the 13th century. A member of this family was Sir William Hamilton (1730–1803), a British diplomat and archaeologist, whose wife, Lady Emma Hamilton (c. 1765–1815), became the mistress of Admiral Horatio Nelson. A branch of the family was established in Ireland by Sir Frederick Hamilton (died 1646), who served in the Swedish army of Gustavus Adolphus. He later became governor of Ulster, and his descendants were created viscounts Boyne. The family have given their name to Newtownhamilton and Hamiltonsbaron in County Armagh. Another branch of the family were to be found in Denmark, where Henrik Albertsen Hamilton (1588–1648) was a noted Latin poet. A 17th-century example of a Hamilton from Glasgow, Scotland, is recorded in the Netherlands, where the name is found in the form Hamelton. Another Scottish Hamilton, James, went to the West Indies in the 18th century and was the father of Alexander Hamilton (1755–1804), who arrived in NY in 1772 and became the first US secretary of the Treasury.

variants.name: Hamill
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Haineville or Henneville in Manche, France, named from the ancient Germanic personal name Hagano + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
English (Lancashire): nickname for a maimed person or someone with a distinctive scar, from Middle English, Old English hamel ‘mutilated, scarred’.
Irish (Ulster): according to MacLysaght, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁdhmaill ‘descendant of Ádhmall’, which he derives from ádhmall ‘active’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow was born in 1274, in Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON, was 49 and his mother, MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH, was 18. He married Mary Gordon about 1319, in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1346, in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow est né en 1274, à Balornock, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON, avait 49 ans et sa mère, MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mary Gordon environ 1319, à Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1346, à Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow 1274 in Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON 49 und seine Mutter MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH 18. Er hat um 1319 in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Mary Gordon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow è nato il nel 1274 nel Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mary Gordon circa 1319, nel Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1346, nel Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzowが1274年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアボーオルノックで生まれた時，父SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTONは49歳，母MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPHは18歳であった。約1319年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカドゾウでMary Gordonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1346年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカドゾウで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow(이)가 1274년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 밸로른옥크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1319년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카드즈에서 Mary Gordon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카드즈에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow nasceu em 1274, em Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Gordon aproximadamente 1319, em Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1346, em Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow родился в 1274 г. в местности балорнокк, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Gordon около 1319 г. в местности кадзоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1346 г. в местности кадзоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow nació en 1274, en Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON, tenía 49 años y su mamá, MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mary Gordon aproximadamente 1319, en Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1346, en Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años.
